title: `ERROR: Incompatible re-declaration of wire \x.` for a variable with struct type named the same as the field of the struct
body:
### Version

Yosys 0.35 (git sha1 cc31c6ebc, ccache clang 14.0.0-1ubuntu1.1 -Os -flto -flto)

### On which OS did this happen?

Linux

### Reproduction Steps

```console
yosys -p 'hierarchy -top top' -f 'verilog -sv' - <<END
typedef struct packed { 
    bit x; 
    bit y; 
} bar;

module top(output x);
    bar x;
endmodule
END
```

### Expected Behavior

No error

### Actual Behavior

```
-- Parsing stdin using frontend `verilog -sv' --

1. Executing Verilog-2005 frontend: <stdin>
Parsing SystemVerilog input from `<stdin>' to AST representation.
Generating RTLIL representation for module `\top'.
<stdin>:6: ERROR: Incompatible re-declaration of wire \x.
```
